input_evidence.name: issue
input_evidence.summary: #7430 [Automation] java run fails for ognl:ognl:3.3.5; label=fails-java-run; body_chars=8015

risks: Local JDK 25 javaTest against the existing 3.2.21 tests and library version 3.3.5 fails in ObjectPropertyAccessorTest due a behavioral/test expectation mismatch, not due missing external setup.

SecurityManager-related OGNL paths are fragile on modern JDKs where SecurityManager APIs are deprecated/disabled; tests should handle unsupported installation rather than requiring a global system property.
libraryPreparationPreflight.summary: OGNL is a pure Java expression/object-graph navigation library; the resolved ognl:ognl:3.3.5 artifact already brings its required runtime dependency org.javassist:javassist:3.29.0-GA transitively, and normal meaningful coverage is reachable with in-memory Java beans and OGNL expressions without Docker, extra Maven dependencies, or required environment/system properties.
